    [FULL_DISCOUNT_LIST] => Array
        (
            [1] => Array
                (
                    [ID] => 1
                    [PRIORITY] => 1000
                    [SORT] => 1
                    [LAST_DISCOUNT] => Y
                    [LAST_LEVEL_DISCOUNT] => N
                    [UNPACK] => function($arOrder){return ((1 == 1)); };
                    [APPLICATION] => function (&$arOrder){\Bitrix\Sale\Discount\Actions::applySimpleGift($arOrder, CCatalogGifterProduct::GenerateApplyCallableFilter('GifterCondIBElement', array(1843), 'all'));};
                    [USE_COUPONS] => Y
                    [EXECUTE_MODULE] => all
                    [NAME] => Товар в подарок
